title: HRMS
subtitle: Quick team hub — mark presence, approve leaves, and keep staff info up to date.

att.title: Attendance
att.desc: Past week by default — filter any dates. Green is present, red is absent.
att.empty: No attendance recorded for this period.
att.notFound: Attendance table not found yet. You can create a table attendance(user_id, hotel_id, day, status, check_in, check_out).

leave.title: Leaves
leave.desc: Review and track time-off. Pending items show in amber.
leave.notFound: Leaves table not found yet. You can create leaves(user_id, hotel_id, start_date, end_date, type, status).

staff.title: Staff
staff.desc: Your people directory — search by name, filter by role, and contact quickly.
